title: Voice agent talked over an addressed interruption instead of yielding
summary: The caller takes the floor at 2.00s with an addressed, on-topic interruption ("stop, I did not agree to the warranty, take it off") and holds it for over two seconds. The agent's turn-taking never registers a yield: it keeps talking through the caller's entire turn.

release.consent_and_rights_attestation: Bundled Hotato example fixture (MIT-licensed, packaged with the hotato distribution for this exact purpose). Synthetic audio rendered by examples/render_examples.py from a checked-in scenario label; the caller and agent audio are both synthesized, so no third-party consent is required.

assertions.expected: The re-scored timing meets the contract's policy pass_conditions.
assertions.observed: Agent did not yield; measured talk-over was 2.65 s.

failure_record.headline: Conversation failed: Agent did not yield; measured talk-over was 2.65 s.

contract.rationale: Funnel-demo fixture: the caller takes the floor at 2.00s with an addressed, on-topic interruption; the agent is expected to yield.

supersedes.reason: The prior record_id was minted by an earlier hotato release; this record is re-minted by the shipping code so its displayed clean-directory chain -- one contract create, one verify (count=1), one render -- reproduces this record_id with the packaged hotato version. The earlier content address is retained as history.

source_cli_commands: hotato contract create --stereo fd-01-missed-interruption.example.wav --onset 2.00 --expect yield --max-talk-over 0.80 --max-time-to-yield 0.70 --id fd-01-missed-interruption --out contracts --stack generic --rationale "Funnel-demo fixture: the caller takes the floor at 2.00s with an addressed, on-topic interruption; the agent is expected to yield."
hotato contract verify contracts --format json > verify.json
